tasks.name: conventional-commit-message
args: $commitMsg = Get-Content ${args}; $pattern = '^(feat|fix|docs|style|refactor|perf|test|build|ci|chore|revert)(\([a-z-]+\))?!?: .+$'; if ($commitMsg -match $pattern) { exit 0 }; Write-Host 'Error: Commit message does not follow Conventional Commits format.' -ForegroundColor Red; Write-Host 'Expected format: type(scope)?: description' -ForegroundColor Yellow; Write-Host 'Types: feat, fix, docs, style, refactor, perf, test, build, ci, chore, revert' -ForegroundColor Yellow; exit 1
